item.name: Whisper A-go-go Key
item.description: It may just be their imagination, but some say they can hear the sound of a thousand groans and a single meow as the key winds the gears.

mount.name: Whisper A-go-go
mount.action: Summon forth the Whisper A-go-go. A flashy upgrade to a small flying vessel designed in the likeness of a Yo-kai named Whisper.
mount.description: Moved by your unyielding dedication and patronage, the wandering executive once again commissioned the architects of the Gold Saucer, this time to upgrade the Whisper-go as a gift from himself and his friend, the wandering minstrel.
mount.tooltip:
Ye gads! What was that
flash from the heavens?
It nearly blinded me!
- Gilgamesh
